column1: # Known-positive liver-fibrosis biomarkers for recall benchmarking (Q6 sanity check).
# Curated from the primary study (Ramachandran 2019, GSE136103), the scar-associated
# macrophage program (Fabre 2023, Sci Immunol), the SMOC2 plasma-biomarker paper
# (GSE207310 / JHEP Reports 2022), and standard hepatology. direction = expected sign in
# fibrosis (all 'up' here). compartment must match the pipeline's analysis compartments.
